name: Cold Buttermilk and Shrimp Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound cooked shrimp, peeled, deveined and chopped
1 cup cucumber, peeled, seeded, and finely chopped
Additional shrimp and cucumber slices for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the buttermilk, mustard, salt, and sugar.
2. Add the chopped shrimp, chopped cucumber, and chives, and stir until well combined.
3. Chill the soup, covered, for 3 hours or until very cold.
4. Garnish each serving with a whole shrimp and a slice of cucumber.
Makes about 5 cups. A favorite from 1944 Gourmet Magazine.
